utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 appear in the final property solution. Now check each for full specification:
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, price, bedrooms, features, maintenance, taxes, possession date) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage type, down payment, arrangement fee, monthly payment, lender verification) — terms are provided and coherent — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes provider, service, cost, closing date — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes provider, service, cost, route, date — fully specified.
- setup_services: includes utilities (provider, package, cost, activation), insurance (provider, coverage, cost, date), survey (type, cost, date) — fully specified.
- total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown (down payment, legal fees, mortgage arrangement, moving services, survey, utilities setup, total initial costs, monthly insurance, available budget, remaining funds) — fully specified.
Thus, 6/6 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes: a purchase property labeled as a Commercial Conversion; financing labeled as First-Time Buyer Mortgage at 90% LTV; legal services labeled as Basic Legal Package; moving services labeled as Standard Moving; and a property survey labeled as Full Structural Survey.
